# Myndare
> Myndare is a product studio building quiet, practical AI-powered tools
> for personal and professional growth.

## Products
### License King (證照王)
- URL: https://myndare.com/licenseking/
- Platform: iOS
- Purpose: Manage professional credentials with OCR, expiration alerts, cloud sync
- Pricing: Free (7 licenses), Personal NT$30/month, Family NT$90/month

### PM Simulator (專案經理模擬器)
- URL: https://myndare.com/products/pm-simulator.html
- Purpose: RPG-style project management learning game

## About
- Founder: Wade Wang, PMP certified, 8+ years PM experience
- Contact: hello@myndare.com
- Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)

## Blog Topics
- Professional license management and renewal
- PMP certification and renewal (PDU tracking)
- Project management skills and WBS
- Taiwan professional certification guides
